name: Rok Salehar
notes: Builds AI chatbots and email/call automation. Has made sales but struggles with customer acquisition. Perfect fit — already sells AI automation, needs an ops layer to scale. Pain: manual outreach, no agent orchestration.

name: Samuel Rondot
notes: Runs 3 SaaS products solo at $28K/mo combined. Managing multiple products without a team = ops overhead. Command Centre automates research, email, social, monitoring across all 3 products from one dashboard.

name: James Fleischmann
notes: Building 2 products: dbrief (AI interview assistant) and LoomFlows (customer feedback). Multi-product solo founder = stretched thin on ops. Needs automated marketing, customer outreach, and competitive research.

name: RK Lokesh
notes: 1-person funnel agency based in India. Running client work solo means every hour on ops is an hour not billing. Command Centre can automate client reporting, email follow-ups, social posting, and research.

name: Mathilde Neau
notes: Runs 'Solo Maker Stack' newsletter curating tools for indie makers. Dual angle: (1) she needs automation for her own newsletter ops, (2) potential influencer/affiliate who could feature Command Centre to her audience of solo founders.

name: wfeaster
notes: Building EmailEmu — email-related SaaS. Solo builder in the email space. Needs automated marketing, competitive research, and growth ops. Our GrowthAgent + EmailAgent combo is a direct value-add.

name: MovingTheLimit
notes: Building trendingpositive.app with T3 stack. Technical solo founder who could benefit from non-technical automation — social media posting, email campaigns, market research — freeing dev time for product.

name: Avo26
notes: Working on B2B CPG MVP for food commercialization. Has been switching platforms — frustrated with tool sprawl. Perfect pain point: one platform to consolidate research, outreach, and ops instead of juggling 5+ tools.

name: Jon Yongfook
notes: Solo founder of Bannerbear at $50K+ MRR. Bootstrapped image automation API. At his scale, ops overhead is significant — support, marketing, competitive monitoring. Team plan ($149/mo) might be better fit given revenue. High-profile conversion would be massive social proof.

name: Damon Chen
notes: Founder of Testimonial.to at $840K+ ARR. Growing fast as solo/small team. Needs automated competitive research, email campaigns, social posting. Team plan prospect. Another high-profile win for social proof.
